greeting.text: Hey, I'm Zevon. I run the rubber workshop, which means useful stuff, weird scraps, and a workbench that is almost organized.

dialogue_tree.text: Bring me raw rubber, fiber, and plant scraps. I can turn them into tire material, inner tube material, brake pads, and rubber sheet.
If something looks messy, it might still be an experiment. If it looks really messy, okay, that one is probably my fault.
